description: savePurchaseRecord awaits the durable write before returning; emitMetric and emitTrace fire-and-forget the insert.

findings.rationale: savePurchaseRecord awaits the insert; the other two emitters fire-and-forget. The await is load-bearing on the purchase path: returning before the write durably commits means a 200 OK can be sent for a purchase the database never persisted. Unifying onto a shared emitter that drops the await re-introduces the silent-loss bug on checkout.
